creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 10/28/2013 4:38 PM, Grzegorz Blach wrote:
> I fixed this issue on Wednesday (22.10), but I forgot to close PR.
> Instead of removing edje_watch from pkg_plist, I added eina and eio to
> USE_EFL. Now edje_watch is built and installed correctly.
> 

Yup it looks ok. Thanks.

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
